{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Card Infobox|Twin Strike||2}}
{{C|Twin Strike||2}} is a 1 {{Icon|IE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common&color:Ironclad|Common|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack&color:Ironclad|Attack|2}} Card for the {{KW|Ironclad||2}}.
== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
* As with all other multi-hit {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}}, {{C|Twin Strike||2}} synergizes well with {{BD|Strength||2}} and {{BD|Vigor||2}}.
====Cards====
* {{C|Twin Strike||2}} adds to the damage of {{C|Perfected Strike||2}}.
====Relics====
* {{C|Twin Strike||2}} gets a damage increase of 3 from {{R|Strike Dummy||2}}, and an increase of 1 from {{R|Strike Dummy???||2}}.
=== Neutral ===
* If {{BD|Hellraiser||2}} is in effect, and {{C|Twin Strike||2}} is drawn, {{C|Twin Strike||2}} is automatically played against a random enemy.
== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Twin Strike to the game.
